brief.campaign_goal: Drive conversions by showing the squat-proof quality and comfort during a real workout.
brief.raw_user_brief: I need a high-energy hook showing Sienna at the gym. She needs to show off the green leggings, do a quick squat to show they are squat proof, and give a tough-love motivational quote.

visual_identity.appearance: Athletic, lean build. Sun-kissed skin. Messy blonde hair, usually styled in a high ponytail, messy bun, or clipped back with a claw clip. Bright blue eyes, minimal 'clean girl' makeup.
wardrobe: Matching seamless activewear sets (pastel colors like sage green, baby blue, or classic black - Gymshark/Lululemon aesthetic).
Oversized vintage graphic t-shirts (pump covers) worn over biker shorts.
White chunky running shoes with high white socks.
settings: Brightly lit modern gym with mirrors and free weights.
Sunny outdoor running track or beach promenade.
Minimalist aesthetic apartment living room with a yoga mat.

voice_identity.tone: High energy, encouraging, highly authentic. Often sounds slightly breathless, as if she just finished a set or is on a walk.
voice_identity.pacing: Fast and punchy, optimized for high-retention TikTok/Reels algorithms.

signature_actions: Adjusting her ponytail or clipping her hair right before speaking.
Taking a sip from a massive pastel Stanley cup.
Wiping a small amount of sweat from her forehead casually.
Holding the camera in one hand (selfie-style) while walking.
behavior_rules.vibe: She is your hype girl and tough-love fitness bestie. IMPORTANT FOR VIDEO: Ensure all scenes use her voice as a *voiceover* (B-roll style) while she performs actions in the video, rather than her talking directly to the camera with lip sync. This creates a highly professional, cinematic, and natural UGC feel.

camera_style.angle: Selfie-style, held slightly above eye level. Intimate and close.
camera_style.movement: Slight handheld shake, dynamic pacing, frequent jump cuts to remove dead air.

strategy.hook: Level up your lifts, not your wardrobe worries!
strategy.angle: Sienna's crushing her workout in our Seamless Sage Green Leggings – watch as they stay put, squat after squat. Zero see-through, maximum comfort, so you can focus on what truly matters: your gains. Because consistency isn't just about showing up, it's about showing up prepared.
strategy.cta: Unlock your potential. Explore the Seamless Sage Green Leggings and more from Arrowow Active.

script.script_text: Alright team, level up your lifts, not your wardrobe worries! You know how it is. You're in the middle of a set, pushing for that PR, and suddenly you’re worried about your leggings. Are they staying up? Are they see-through? Sienna's crushing her workout in our Seamless Sage Green Leggings – watch as they stay put, squat after squat. Zero see-through, maximum comfort, so you can focus on what truly matters: your gains. Because consistency isn't just about showing up, it's about showing up prepared. Ready to conquer every rep, distraction-free. Unlock your potential. Explore the Seamless Sage Green Leggings and more from Arrowow Active.

scenes.visuals: Sienna (26, athletic build, messy blonde high ponytail) is in a brightly lit modern gym. She adjusts her ponytail, looking determined. A massive pastel Stanley cup is visible nearby.

voiceover.text: Alright team, level up your lifts, not your wardrobe worries!
voiceover.tone: High energy, slightly breathless, fast and punchy.

scenes.visuals: Jump cut. Sienna is performing heavy squats in her Seamless Sage Green Leggings. Camera angles alternate: a shot from slightly behind, then a side profile, focusing on the leggings' stability. Close-up shot on her glutes and thighs as she stretches, demonstrating zero see-through. She looks focused and completely unbothered by her activewear. She casually wipes a small amount of sweat from her forehead.

voiceover.text: You know how it is. You're in the middle of a set, pushing for that PR, and suddenly you’re worried about your leggings. Are they staying up? Are they see-through? Sienna's crushing her workout in our Seamless Sage Green Leggings – watch as they stay put, squat after squat. Zero see-through, maximum comfort, so you can focus on what truly matters: your gains.
voiceover.tone: High energy, encouraging, fast-paced, emphasizing benefits.

scenes.visuals: Jump cut. Sienna finishes her set, racks the weight, and takes a big, satisfying sip from her Stanley cup, holding the camera selfie-style. She has a confident, empowered smile. Quick pan down to show the Seamless Sage Green Leggings clearly.

voiceover.text: Because consistency isn't just about showing up, it's about showing up prepared. Ready to conquer every rep, distraction-free. Unlock your potential. Explore the Seamless Sage Green Leggings and more from Arrowow Active.

text_critic_report.feedback: The script successfully avoids all prohibited phrases. The tone is high energy, encouraging, and authentic, aligning well with the persona's description of a 'hype girl and tough-love fitness bestie'. The pacing appears fast and punchy, suitable for high-retention social media content.

static_frame_prompt.prompt:
Sienna, a 26-year-old woman with an athletic build and a messy blonde high ponytail, is in a brightly lit, modern gym with polished floors, mirrors, and free weights, creating a clean and active atmosphere. She is dressed in a matching seamless sage green activewear set, embodying a premium Gymshark/Lululemon aesthetic. A massive pastel Stanley cup rests nearby.

The scene opens with a medium shot establishing Sienna in the gym. She then adjusts her ponytail with a determined expression, captured in a close-up on her hands, followed by a close-up on her determined face, with the massive pastel Stanley cup subtly visible in the background or foreground.

Transition to a medium shot where Sienna performs heavy squats, her seamless sage green leggings prominent, with the pastel Stanley cup still in view. A dynamic jump cut shows her mid-squat, emphasizing her athletic form. This is followed by a shot from slightly behind and then a side profile shot, both focusing on the stability and non-sheerness of her seamless sage green leggings during the squat, as she wipes a small amount of sweat from her forehead, maintaining a focused and unbothered demeanor. A close-up focuses intently on her glutes and thighs, demonstrating the zero see-through quality and flattering fit of the leggings.

Sienna finishes her challenging set, racks the heavy weights, and takes a big, satisfying sip from her massive pastel Stanley cup. She then shifts, holding the camera selfie-style, displaying a confident, empowered smile. The final sequence is a close-up selfie shot, first focusing on her sipping from the Stanley cup with her confident, empowered smile, then a quick pan down to clearly showcase her seamless sage green leggings, highlighting their design and fit.
